name: a3ip-creator
description: A Cowork skill and supporting Python scripts that guide an AI through authoring a new A3IP package from scratch. Conducts a structured intake conversation, generates the complete package directory, runs completeness validation, and produces the distributable bundle.
author: Maksym Prydorozhko <maksym.prydorozhko@gmail.com>

protocols.name: create-package
protocols.description: Guides through creating a new A3IP package from scratch: intake conversation, scaffold, validate, and build.
steps: Conduct the Phase 1 intake conversation with the user (Groups 1-8).
Write intake.json to the output directory.
Run script scaffold to generate the full package directory.
Run script validate and fix any errors until it reports ok: true.
Ask whether this is for external distribution (embed spec) or internal use.
Run script bundle (with --spec if external distribution).
Present the Completion Summary to the user.

protocols.name: cut-version
protocols.description: Cuts a new package version: bumps manifest, prepends changelog entry, validates, and rebundles.
steps: Ask the user what changed in this version.
Classify each change as breaking or non-breaking.
Determine the new version number (semver) and confirm with the user.
Run script new_version with the package directory and new version number.
Fill in the changelog entry: Summary, Upgrade steps, Breaking changes.
Apply the actual file changes the version describes.
Run script validate and fix any errors.
Run script bundle to produce the updated distributable bundle.

skills.name: a3ip-creator
skills.description: Guides the AI through authoring a new A3IP package from scratch in four phases: Intake, Scaffold, Validate, Build. Also handles cutting new versions (Phase 5).

scripts.description: Generates a complete A3IP package directory from an intake.json file.
Runs 7 completeness checks on an A3IP package directory and reports errors and warnings.
Generates a .a3ip.bundle file from a package directory. Supports --spec flag to embed the A3IP spec for external distribution.
Generates a .a3ip.zip archive from a package directory for human file transfer.
Cuts a new package version: bumps version in manifest.yaml, updates latest_change, and prepends a changelog entry template to CHANGELOG.md.

tools.name: python
tools.purpose: Runs all Creator scripts (scaffold, validate, bundle, zip, new_version).

tools.name: pyyaml
tools.purpose: Improves manifest parsing accuracy in validate.py.
tools.fallback: validate.py includes a minimal regex-based YAML parser that handles all required fields without PyYAML.
